senses.definition: a long and narrow piece of wood attached to the bottom of the walls of a house

examples.x: The carpenter installed a new baseboard to give the room a finished look.
Dust tends to accumulate along the top edge of the baseboard.
We chose a decorative baseboard to match the vintage style of our home.
The painter carefully taped around the baseboard before starting to paint the walls.
The baseboard in the living room was chipped and needed some touch-up work.

senses.definition: a bag made of cloth that is filled with soft material, used for leaning or sitting on

examples.x: She fluffed up the cushions on the sofa for added comfort.
He placed a decorative cushion on the armchair to complement the room's decor.
They added cushions to the outdoor furniture to make it more comfortable for lounging.
The window seat was adorned with plush cushions for cozy reading nook.
She leaned back against the cushion while watching TV.

senses.definition: a large ornamental piece of cloth hung around and above a bed or on a wall
a thing that is added to make something look more beautiful
a small decorative item, often trivial or of little value, used to adorn shelves or display surfaces

examples.x: The shelves in her living room were filled with knickknacks collected from her travels around the world, each one holding sentimental value.
Despite their small size, the knickknacks scattered around the room added personality and charm to the otherwise plain decor.

senses.definition: something that is used to decorate a house, piece of clothing, etc.
a colored liquid that you put on a surface to decorate or protect it

examples.x: She bought a can of blue paint to redecorate her bedroom.
The furniture was covered with a protective layer of paint to prevent damage.
The painter used a roller to apply the paint evenly on the wall.
The walls of the house were covered with a fresh coat of white paint.
They mixed red and yellow paint to create an orange color.

senses.definition: a long and narrow piece of wood attached horizontally to a wall, which is designed to hang pictures from

examples.x: The living room walls were decorated with several paintings hanging from the picture rail.
She adjusted the frames on the picture rail to make sure they were evenly spaced.
The picture rail in the hallway made it easy to change the artwork whenever she wanted.
He installed a picture rail to avoid putting holes in the newly painted walls.
They decided to hang the large painting from the picture rail to keep it safe from damage.

senses.definition: the act of changing the style or appearance of a room by adding or updating things like colors, furniture, or decorations

examples.x: The redecoration of the office made it feel much brighter and more welcoming for employees.
She spent the weekend on redecoration, adding new curtains and rearranging the furniture.
After the redecoration, the entire space looked more spacious and elegant.
His idea for redecoration was to bring in some plants and artwork to liven up the room.

senses.definition: an informal decoration style using items and pieces of furniture that look old and worn-out in a pleasant way
a type of thick paper used for covering the surface of a wall or ceiling, particularly for decoration

examples.x: They decided to redo the living room with floral wallpaper.
She chose a light grey wallpaper to brighten up the small bedroom.
The wallpaper had a vintage floral pattern, adding character to the room.
He spent the afternoon putting up new wallpaper in the dining room.
The kids’ room was decorated with cartoon-themed wallpaper.

senses.definition: to adorn the inside of a house or room in order to make it more beautiful

examples.x: They decided to decorate the living room with a fresh coat of light blue paint to create a serene atmosphere.
The restaurant owner hired a local artist to decorate the dining area by painting a striking mural.
The interior designer suggested decorating the accent wall with bold wallpaper featuring a floral motif.
The homeowners spent the weekend decorating the dining room with a stylish striped wallpaper.
They hired professionals to decorate the office space with a modern and sleek wallpaper design.

senses.definition: to attach a painting, clock, etc. to a wall using a hook
to add decorative items to something in order to make it look more attractive

examples.x: During the holiday season, they ornamented the Christmas tree with colorful lights and ornaments.
The baker decided to ornament the cake with edible flowers for a festive touch.
To celebrate the occasion, they ornamented the venue with elegant drapes and floral arrangements.
The seamstress skillfully ornamented the gown with intricate embroidery and sequins.
To personalize the space, she ornamented her desk with small trinkets and framed photos.

senses.definition: to cover a surface or object with a colored liquid, usually for decoration

examples.x: They spent the weekend painting their living room walls a soothing shade of blue.
To enhance the curb appeal, the homeowner chose to paint the front door a bold red.
The artist painted the fence white to match the house.
He painted the old wooden chair black to give it a fresh look.
They decided to paint the exterior of their house a cheerful yellow.

senses.definition: to stick a thick and often decorative paper onto the wall or ceiling of a building
to change the appearance of a room by applying new paint or wallpaper
a small object, typically made of metal or wood, that is placed on either end of a row of books to keep them standing upright and prevent them from falling over
a block or stick of wax with a string inside that can be lit to produce light

examples.x: As part of the ceremony, they each lit a candle to symbolize unity and hope.
The flickering candle cast dancing shadows on the wall as they enjoyed a romantic dinner.
The sweet aroma of vanilla filled the air as the candle burned slowly on the coffee table.
The power outage forced us to rely on candles for illumination during the storm.

senses.definition: any type of artwork, decoration or adornment that is displayed on the walls of a room or space, such as paintings, photographs, posters, tapestries, and other decorative items
ornamental elements like knobs, pulls, handles, hinges, and accessories that are added to furniture, cabinetry, doors, etc. to enhance their appearance

examples.x: The antique drawer handles were a beautiful piece of decorative hardware in the kitchen.
She chose brass decorative hardware for the cabinets to match the vintage feel of the room.
The new decorative hardware on the doors added a touch of elegance to the living room.
The bathroom looked much more stylish after she updated the faucets and other decorative hardware.

senses.definition: a decorative structure that holds and displays artwork, consisting of a frame and a protective sheet of glass or plastic

examples.x: She placed the family photo in a beautiful wooden picture frame on the mantelpiece.
The artist chose an ornate gold picture frame to display his latest painting.
The picture frame cracked when it accidentally fell off the shelf.
He gave her a picture frame as a gift with a picture of their vacation inside.
I need to buy a new picture frame for this artwork before hanging it on the wall.

senses.definition: a small cushion that is used primarily for aesthetic purposes to add color, texture, and style to a room's décor

examples.x: The throw pillows on the bed matched the curtains perfectly.
He fluffed the throw pillows before sitting down to watch a movie.
After cleaning the house, she arranged the throw pillows neatly on the couch.
I bought new throw pillows to give the room a fresh look for the season.

senses.definition: a container used as a decoration or used for putting cut flowers in

examples.x: The elegant crystal vase displayed a stunning arrangement of freshly cut flowers on the dining room table.
The antique vase, passed down through generations, was a cherished family heirloom.
The ceramic vase, hand-painted with intricate designs, added a touch of artistry to the room.
The florist carefully selected a tall, slender vase to complement the long stems of the roses.
As a gift, she received a delicate glass vase filled with fragrant lavender, bringing a touch of nature indoors.

senses.definition: a solid figure or object made as a work of art by shaping and carving wood, clay, stone, etc.

examples.x: The park was adorned with various sculptures, each representing a different aspect of local culture.
Visitors marveled at the towering bronze sculpture that stood at the entrance of the museum.
The gallery showcased a collection of contemporary sculptures crafted by emerging artists from around the world.
The public art installation featured a series of abstract sculptures that sparked conversation and contemplation among passersby.
The museum displayed an ancient marble sculpture of a Greek goddess.

senses.definition: a small decorative statue or sculpture typically made from materials such as porcelain, ceramic, wood, or resin
a plant grown in a container and used for decorative purposes in indoor spaces

examples.x: She placed the potted plant on the windowsill to get more sunlight.
The living room looked brighter with the addition of a large potted plant near the corner.
I bought a new potted plant for my office to help freshen the air.
They decorated the porch with several colorful potted plants for a cheerful look.

senses.definition: a mixture of fragrant ingredients, such as dried flowers, herbs, and spices, used for decorative and aromatic purposes
a vinyl or paper-based graphic design or image applied to a flat surface, commonly used for decorative purposes in a room's décor

examples.x: The bathroom walls were enhanced with simple, nature-themed wall decals that gave it a calming vibe.
The nursery was brightened up with cute animal wall decals that added a playful touch.
I added a motivational quote as a wall decal above my desk to inspire me every day.
After repainting the kitchen, I added a fruit wall decal to give the space a more vibrant feel.
She decorated her bedroom with a large flower wall decal for a fresh, lively look.

senses.definition: a thick piece of handwoven textile with designs or pictures on it that is used for hangings, curtains, etc.

examples.x: The medieval castle's walls were adorned with intricate tapestries depicting heroic battles.
She inherited a beautiful tapestry from her grandmother, showcasing a forest scene with wildlife.
The museum displayed ancient tapestries from different cultures, each telling a unique story.
The living room was decorated with a vibrant tapestry featuring geometric patterns.
He admired the tapestry in the church, which depicted scenes from biblical stories.

senses.definition: a suspended decorative object that moves in response to air currents or manipulation, commonly used for visual interest and stimulation in indoor spaces
a vessel, typically made of glass, ceramic, or metal, that is designed to hold small objects or to be displayed for decorative purposes

examples.x: I placed a few decorative stones in the decorative bowl to create a calming effect.
She filled the decorative bowl with fresh fruit to brighten up the kitchen.
The ceramic decorative bowl was the perfect centerpiece for the dining table.
He chose a glass decorative bowl to display on the shelf next to the artwork.

senses.definition: a standing light fixture with a tall base and a lampshade that provides illumination in a room
a small lamp designed to be placed on a table or desk, typically featuring a decorative base and a lampshade that diffuses the light
a timepiece designed to be mounted on a wall, typically featuring an analog or digital display and used to indicate the time
a tall wooden case clock with a pendulum inside that stands on the floor
a freestanding, weight-driven pendulum clock that is typically smaller than a grandfather clock and stands approximately 5 to 6 feet tall
a variety of textile materials, including tablecloths, napkins, placemats, and runners, that are used to cover and decorate a table during a meal or special occasion

examples.x: She carefully arranged the table linen before the guests arrived for dinner.
The bright floral table linen added a cheerful touch to the summer picnic.
The restaurant provided white table linen to give the dining area a formal feel.
I always use colorful table linen for special occasions to make the meal feel more festive.

senses.definition: a decorative container with planted flowers that is attached to a small rope or chain to enable it to stay suspended from a building or other public places

examples.x: She placed a colorful hanging basket on the porch to brighten up the entrance.
He watered the plants in the hanging basket every morning to keep them healthy.
The house looked charming with a few hanging baskets full of petunias by the front door.
The hanging basket on the balcony is filled with vibrant flowers that attract butterflies.

senses.definition: a large decorative container that is used to grow plants in
a decorative container placed outside a window in which people grow flowers and other plants

examples.x: The apartment's windows were adorned with vibrant window boxes filled with cascading petunias and ivy, adding a splash of color to the urban landscape.
She spent the afternoon planting herbs like basil and thyme in her kitchen window box, ensuring fresh ingredients for her cooking year-round.
The historic townhouses along the street were distinguished by their ornate wrought iron balconies, each adorned with a charming window box bursting with geraniums and daisies.
In springtime, tourists flock to the quaint village known for its picturesque window boxes overflowing with tulips and daffodils.
The café's windowsills were decorated with rustic wooden window boxes planted with aromatic lavender and rosemary, enhancing the outdoor dining experience.

senses.definition: a decorative object that is designed to hold one or more candles, typically made of metal, glass, or ceramic and used to create ambient lighting in a room
a decorative cover attached to a lamp for the purpose of directing or softening its light as well as providing some protection
a large mirror that is typically mounted on a wall or placed on a stand, and provides a reflection of a person's entire body
a decorative bracket or sconce designed to hold candles or lights and often features ornate and elaborate designs with multiple arms or branches

examples.x: The antique shop had a beautiful girandole with delicate candle holders and a mirrored background.
She admired the ornate girandole on the wall, its candles casting a warm glow across the room.
The living room was decorated with a vintage girandole, which added elegance to the space.
The girandole on the mantelpiece added a touch of sophistication to the fireplace area.
He carefully polished the girandole, making sure the mirror gleamed in the soft candlelight.

senses.definition: a full-length mirror that is mounted on a frame with adjustable angles so that it can be tilted to various positions for optimal viewing

examples.x: She stood in front of the cheval glass to make sure her outfit looked perfect before heading out.
The cheval glass in the hallway was the perfect spot for checking her look before leaving the house.
After trying on several dresses, she checked her reflection in the cheval glass to decide which one to wear.
He adjusted the cheval glass to get a better view of the back of his suit.

senses.definition: a type of board made of perforated hardboard used for organizing tools and other small items

examples.x: The garage was organized with a pegboard to hang all the tools.
She used a pegboard in her craft room to keep her paintbrushes and scissors neatly arranged.
The kitchen had a pegboard on the wall to hang cooking utensils and spices.
The pegboard in the workshop allowed him to quickly find the right tool for the job.
They installed a pegboard in the basement to store gardening tools and accessories.

senses.definition: a cloth covering placed or hung over something such as a bed or seat, used as a decoration or shelter
a flat surface made of glass that people can see themselves in

examples.x: He adjusted his tie while gazing into the mirror above the dresser.
She looked at her reflection in the mirror before leaving the house.
The bathroom mirror was foggy from the steam of the hot shower.
She applied makeup in front of the magnifying mirror on the vanity.

senses.definition: a decorative centerpiece consisting of a large, often multi-tiered, branching stand with bowls or dishes attached for holding fruits, flowers, or other decorative items

examples.x: The grand dining table was adorned with a beautiful epergne, filled with fresh flowers.
For their anniversary, they decided to place an antique silver epergne at the center of the table.
The bride's family used a delicate glass epergne to display roses at the wedding reception.
The epergne was passed down through generations and became a cherished family heirloom.
She carefully arranged the colorful fruit in the epergne to create a stunning centerpiece for the feast.

senses.definition: a decorative lighting arrangement consisting of a string or series of small bulbs connected by a wire or cable

examples.x: String lighting can transform a backyard into a magical setting for evening gatherings.
For the party, they decorated the living room with string lighting around the walls.
She used string lighting to add a cozy touch to her bedroom during the holidays.
The wedding venue was decorated with string lighting that highlighted the elegant table settings.
They added string lighting to the balcony, making it a perfect spot for evening relaxation.
